# Spine WebGL Runtime

- Package: `@esotericsoftware/spine-webgl`
- Version: `4.2.43`
- Browser build: `spine-webgl-4.2.43.min.js`
- SHA-256: `4CB43E0B815869CE45A3DC6CDAB4A7FF68EEB432DF3D24A7E34C919F3D46A771`
- Source: `https://www.npmjs.com/package/@esotericsoftware/spine-webgl/v/4.2.43`

The runtime is vendored so the game can load through `file://` without a CDN or an npm install. Its license is preserved in `LICENSE`. A valid Spine Editor license is required as described by that license.
